page_metadata.biotools__summary: Virtual Acoustics (VA) is a real-time auralization framework for scientific research providing modules and interfaces for experiments and demonstrations. It is open source and fully controllable enabling reproducible research.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Virtual Acoustics (VA) is a real-time auralization framework for scientific research providing modules and interfaces for experiments and demonstrations. It is open source and fully controllable enabling reproducible research.
